name: leather
identity: Crude leather used by two human-sized figures to obscure their faces while they move with stealth through the forest.
current_status: Worn by one of two captors emerging from the shadows, used to obscure their face while they approach the player with a spear.

volatile_state.current_activity: being worn by a captor approaching the player

notes: The text mentions 'furs and leather' together; it is unclear if the leather is a separate item or part of the furs. Inferred as a distinct face covering based on the phrasing 'faces obscured by furs and leather'.
